title: perityle effusa
intro: Perityle effusa, also known as the 'sticky stem bush', is a type of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Perityle effusa can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal uses.
